color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Claude API down
→ Phase 1 atomization fails
→ Phase 4 classification fails
→ Items become REVIEW_REQUIRED
IMPACT: HIGH

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Qdrant down
→ Phase 2 Source A empty
→ Degraded retrieval (Sources B+C)
→ Lower composite scores
IMPACT: MEDIUM

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
PostgreSQL down
→ No checkpointing
→ No write-back
→ No crash recovery
IMPACT: CRITICAL

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Redis down
→ No progress events
→ WebSocket dark
→ Pipeline still runs
IMPACT: LOW (pipeline ok)

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Presidio down
→ Regex fallback activates
→ Reduced PII coverage
IMPACT: LOW

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
fastembed fails
→ No embeddings
→ Phase 2+3 fail
IMPACT: HIGH

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Celery + Redis Broker
(task dispatch,
retry, dead-letter)

ONNX Runtime, 384-dim
LOCAL — no network

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
